select
distinct
from dbo.v_rcvorder
order by ${orderByClause}

mapper.update:
update dbo.v_rcvorder
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rorder_item = #{record.rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rorder_fno = #{record.rorderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
price_enduser = #{record.priceEnduser,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
eprice = #{record.eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tax_rate = #{record.taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ntax_pice = #{record.ntaxPice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ntax_amount = #{record.ntaxAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tax_amount = #{record.taxAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount = #{record.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
dlv_type = #{record.dlvType,jdbcType=CHAR},
discount = #{record.discount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
dlv_date = #{record.dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cdlv_date = #{record.cdlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
spec_offer_no = #{record.specOfferNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
delete_status = #{record.deleteStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
source_type = #{record.sourceType,jdbcType=CHAR},
cproduct_no = #{record.cproductNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
stock_code = #{record.stockCode,jdbcType=CHAR},
stock_type = #{record.stockType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
spec_mark = #{record.specMark,jdbcType=CHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
product_name = #{record.productName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
opponent = #{record.opponent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
allot_time = #{record.allotTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ready_time = #{record.readyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
exp_time = #{record.expTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ship_time = #{record.shipTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ready_qty = #{record.readyQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
exp_qty = #{record.expQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
returned_qty = #{record.returnedQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
allocated_qty = #{record.allocatedQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ppl_no = #{record.pplNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_no = #{record.projectNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address_no = #{record.addressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
custom_code = #{record.customCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=CHAR},
user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=CHAR},
end_user = #{record.endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ROrdDate = #{record.rorddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
dlv_entire = #{record.dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR},
DlvSite = #{record.dlvsite,jdbcType=CHAR},
TransFee = #{record.transfee,jdbcType=CHAR},
TransChannel = #{record.transchannel,jdbcType=CHAR},
PrjCode = #{record.prjcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORorderNo = #{record.ororderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvType = #{record.dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
Employee = #{record.employee,jdbcType=CHAR},
EmployeeNo = #{record.employeeno,jdbcType=CHAR},
OptTime = #{record.opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Operator = #{record.operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_No = #{record.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ContractNo = #{record.contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QuotationNo = #{record.quotationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PurchaseNO = #{record.purchaseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CttFlag = #{record.cttflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
PriceChecked = #{record.pricechecked,jdbcType=BIT},
HLCode = #{record.hlcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trade_companyId = #{record.tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
process_date = #{record.processDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
sales_info_no = #{record.salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shikomi_no = #{record.shikomiNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
corder_no = #{record.corderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
